# Review checklist

## Accuracy
- Do all referenced files exist?
- Do example trees match the current repository?

## Layering
- Is Claude-specific behavior in `.claude/`?
- Is GitHub/Copilot-specific behavior in `.github/`?
- Are shared external skills kept in `skills/`?

## Agent and skill quality
- Are names specific and descriptive?
- Do descriptions say what the agent/skill does and when to use it?
- Are permissions and tools appropriate?

## Teaching value
- Is the content specific to this repository?
- Does each file teach a real purpose?
- Are explanations practical and not just labels?
